"the total count requires careful analysis of the given data.

midnight brings a quiet time for solving such math puzzles.

we know the sum of the largest five is a small fraction.

the sum of the smallest five is also a small fraction.

adding these two fractions gives us a value less than one.

this implies there are other numbers between the groups.

the remaining numbers make up the rest of the total sum.

we can calculate the exact count by solving the equation.

the answer is nine numbers written on the board."
